mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, email, password,nickname,avatar,bio, gender,student_id,department, major,grade,points,role,status,is_verified,login_ip,login_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{gender}, #{studentId}, #{department}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{points}, #{role}, #{status}, #{isVerified}, #{loginIp}, #{loginTime} )
mapper.select: select username, email, password, nickname, avatar, bio, gender, student_id, department, major, grade, points, role, status, is_verified, login_ip, login_time from users where email=#{email};
